basic_details.job_title: CDAC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 951 Project Engineer, Project Manager and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC), A Scientific Society under MeitY, Government of India
basic_details.post_name: Project Associate, Project Technician, Project Support Staff, Project Engineer / PS&O Executive, Senior Project Engineer / Module Lead / Project Leader, Project Officer, Project Manager / Program Manager / Program Delivery Manager / Knowledge Partner, Project Head, Administrative Associate
basic_details.job_location: Bengaluru, Chennai, Noida, Pune, Mumbai, Hyderabad, Delhi, Mohali, Kolkata, Thiruvananthapuram, Guwahati (CINE/North East) – and project sites across India
basic_details.short_information: C-DAC is recruiting across 11 centres pan-India for contractual positions including Project Associate, Project Engineer, Senior Project Engineer, Project Manager, and support roles in domains spanning AI/ML, Cyber Security, VLSI, HPC, Embedded Systems, Full Stack Development, Quantum Computing, and more. No application fee is charged, and the last date to apply online is 20 June 2026.

important_dates.age and experience cut-off date: Last Date of Submission of Application (i.e., 20 June 2026)
important_dates.interview_date: Will be communicated later by email only

application_fee.details: C-DAC charges absolutely no application fee for any position under this recruitment cycle - this applies to all categories including General, SC, ST, OBC, EWS, and PwBD candidates across all 11 centres.

age_limit.details: Upper age limits vary by position level and are calculated as on the last date of application, i.e., 20 June 2026. SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen and Government employees are eligible for age relaxation as per Government of India norms.

qualification.nationality: Citizen of India (standard Government of India norms apply)
qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.Tech or equivalent degree (min 60% or equivalent CGPA for most posts; 50% for Project Associate at some centres) OR PG in Science/Computer Application/relevant domain with requisite percentage OR ME/M.Tech OR Ph.D. in relevant discipline – from AICTE/UGC-approved institution or recognized university. For support/admin posts: Graduation with 50% + relevant experience.
qualification.experience: Post-qualification work experience as specified against each post. Academic/teaching/research/internship/project placements as part of curriculum are NOT counted as experience unless specifically mentioned. Experience must be supported by certificates from employer clearly showing period, salary, and post held.
qualification.details: All candidates must hold qualifications from AICTE/UGC-approved colleges or recognized universities. Candidates in their final semester may apply but can join only after clearing the examination with the required minimum marks.

vacancy_details.Key Domains: VLSI, HPC, Cyber Security, AI/ML, Quantum Computing, Embedded Systems, IoT, Cryptography, Automotive
AI/ML, HPC, IoT, Cyber Security, Full Stack, Cloud, Quantum, Data Science, UI/UX
e-Governance, Health Informatics, Embedded Systems, Education & Training, Speech & NLP, Data Centre

AI/ML, Full Stack, Cyber Security, Robotics, Communication, DevOps, Mobile App, Civil
Cyber Security, VLSI/Chip Design, Quantum Computing, Full Stack, Blockchain, Data Analytics
Full Stack, Cyber Security, Database Administration, Network Security, Embedded Systems, Data Centre
Robotics, Software Development, AI, Quantum/HPC, Additive Manufacturing, Cyber Security, IoT, Embedded
Computer Science, Electronics, Software Engineering (domain details per individual position listing)
Embedded, VLSI, AI/ML, Cyber Security, Full Stack, Software Development (locations: Guwahati, Imphal, Itanagar, Gangtok)

salary_details.pay_scale: Project Associate: Rs. 28,750 – Rs. 35,000/month | Project Engineer: Rs. 39,100 – Rs. 50,000/month | Senior Project Engineer: Rs. 60,000 – Rs. 75,000/month | Project Manager: Rs. 64,000 – Rs. 1,60,000/month (varies by centre and domain)

selection_process: Selection is multi-stage: initial academic screening
followed by a written test if required
and a personal interview. Only shortlisted candidates are contacted by email - no hard copy communication is sent at any stage.

physical_eligibility.details: The C-DAC JIT June 2026 Recruitment is a large-scale opportunity with openings across 11 centres and hundreds of positions spanning fresher to senior levels. Competition is expected to be moderate to high for roles in high-demand domains such as AI/ML, Full Stack Development, Cyber Security, and Software Development, particularly at the Project Engineer and Senior Project Engineer levels, which attract the largest pools of applicants from tier-2 and tier-3 engineering colleges. Vacancies for niche domains like Quantum Computing, VLSI, Additive Manufacturing, Robotics, and HPC System Software will see comparatively lower competition but require highly specialised credentials. The absence of any application fee significantly increases the applicant volume. | Effective competition will be filtered through the initial academic screening stage, where CGPA, percentage, and domain relevance determine shortlisting. Candidates who have internships, publications, or project work in their declared domain may gain an advantage even if such experience is not counted formally. For experienced positions, those with documented employer-issued experience certificates closely matching the domain will clear the first cut. Candidates applying to Noida (e-Governance, Health Informatics) and Pune (high volume, 200+ positions) will face steeper competition due to location preference and breadth of domain coverage.

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the C-DAC careers portal (https://careers.cdac.in/). No offline/hard copy applications are accepted. A valid mobile number and email ID are mandatory as OTP-based login is used and all communications are sent by email only.
Documents Required to be Scanned and Uploaded:
Passport-size photograph in .jpg format (not more than 400 KB)
Resume / CV in PDF format (not more than 500 KB)
important_instructions: These are CONTRACTUAL positions - no right to regular or permanent employment in C-DAC is created by engagement under this recruitment. Candidates may be deputed or transferred from one project to another at any C-DAC project location across India based on organizational requirement. The contract is initially for up to 3 years (1 year for Kolkata centre) or project completion, whichever is earlier. Extension is possible based on performance and project requirement. All correspondence including interview call letters will be sent by email only - candidates must keep their registered email ID and mobile number active throughout the process. C-DAC reserves the right to increase/decrease the number of posts, change eligibility criteria, cancel any or all positions, or modify/cancel the selection process at any stage without notice. If selected candidates are found ineligible at any stage - even after joining - their engagement is liable to be terminated without notice. No TA/DA is payable for attending the written test or interview at any centre. C-DAC has not authorized any agent or agency to represent it for recruitment matters - beware of fraudulent offers. All updates, corrigenda, and extensions will be published only on the official website www.cdac.in. Canvassing in any form will result in disqualification.
